cognitive_layer.purpose: Quality control identifies and removes low-quality cells that could bias downstream analysis. Cells with low gene counts may be empty droplets or dying cells. Cells with high mitochondrial content may be undergoing apoptosis. Calculating QC metrics before filtering establishes baseline data quality.

parameter_impact.min_genes: Minimum number of genes expressed per cell. Higher values remove more cells but increase data quality. For 10x data, 200-500 is typical. Too high removes valid cells; too low retains empty droplets.
parameter_impact.min_cells: Minimum cells a gene must be expressed in to be retained. Higher values remove rare genes but reduce noise. For 10x data, 3-10 is typical.
parameter_impact.max_mito_pct: Maximum proportion of mitochondrial counts per cell. Higher values retain more cells but may include dying cells. 10-20% is typical; above 20% often indicates apoptosis.

error_handling.KeyError: pct_counts_mito: Mitochondrial genes not properly annotated. Ensure genes starting with 'MT-' are present or set qc_vars manually.
error_handling.ValueError: min_genes must be positive: Ensure min_genes parameter is a positive integer.

too_strict_removal_high.causal_chain: min_genes controls the minimum gene count threshold. Higher values reject more cells, so reducing it allows cells with fewer genes to pass.
too_strict_removal_high.expected_effect: More cells pass filtering, lower removal rate

too_lenient_removal_low.causal_chain: Increasing min_genes raises the quality threshold, filtering out cells with fewer detected genes which are often empty droplets.
too_lenient_removal_low.expected_effect: Fewer but higher-quality cells pass filtering

high_mito_retention.causal_chain: max_mito_pct filters cells by mitochondrial content. Lower values reject more cells with high mitochondrial percentage, which are often apoptotic.

low_mito_removal.adjust: increase max_mito_pct by 5-10 if cells look healthy
low_mito_removal.causal_chain: Higher max_mito_pct allows cells with more mitochondrial content to pass, which may be valid if tissue has high metabolic activity.
